name: Aspect
short_description: Aspect is a retro-inspired roguelite dungeon crawler, where enemies drop Aspects - fragments of their power, that you can use against them. With a variety of enemies to face, weapons to find, and procedurally generated levels, no two playthroughs are the same. Will you collect all of the Aspects?
detailed_description:
Aspect is an early access retro-inspired roguelite dungeon crawler, where enemies drop Aspects - fragments of their power, that you can use against them. With a variety of enemies to face, weapons to find, and procedurally generated levels, no two playthroughs are the same

The current Early Access version has:

  • 30+ weapons, with unique mechanics

  • A diverse cast of enemies, each one a unique challenge - but if you can get their Aspects, you can turn the tides and use these powers against them!

  • Two different types of cave to explore, each one offering different loot and monsters.

  • Aspects: Accessories, gained from each enemy, that let the player use some of the enemy's power.

  • All kinds of structures to be encountered in the caves and offer the player new weapons and loot.

  • A retro-inspired pixel art design, with similarly inspired music.

The aim of the finished game is replay ability - no two playthroughs will be the same, and much more content is planned to come.

Will you make it through the dungeon and collect all the aspects?
